hero.title: The smile
hero.subtitle: We design the smile that speaks the same language as your goals. Made with you, in our own lab.

home.introText: We don't make catalogue smiles. We co-create a smile that feels yours, with art, science and our own lab.
home.ctaText: Not just a treatment, it's a conversation where we design your smile in 3D together, you try it before we touch anything, and we sculpt it by hand. In less than two weeks, the smile from the screen will be on your face forever.

treatments.title: Everything your smile needs
treatments.subtitle: Tap a treatment to see the detail.
treatments.waMessage: Hi, I'd like more information about {{name}}.

items.name: Dental Aesthetics
items.summary: Veneers, smile design and more to improve your smile's harmony with a natural result that boosts your confidence.

items.name: Oral Rehabilitation
items.summary: We restore the function and aesthetics of your mouth with precision prosthetics, for a harmonious, lasting smile.

items.name: Digital Oral Rehabilitation
items.summary: We scan your mouth and design your smile digitally, for a more comfortable, exact treatment. You see the result before we start.

items.name: Endodontics
items.summary: Treatment of the inside of the tooth to remove the pain of a deep infection and preserve the piece.

items.name: Periodontics
items.summary: Prevention and treatment of gum and bone disease to avoid tooth loss.

items.name: Teeth Whitening
items.summary: We lighten the shade of your teeth safely and under supervision, removing stains for a brighter smile.

items.name: Tooth Extraction
items.summary: Removal of damaged teeth with the most careful technique to minimise discomfort and protect your oral health.

items.name: Oral Surgery
items.summary: Safe surgical procedures to treat teeth, lesions and cysts, restoring your oral health.

items.name: Dental Implants
items.summary: We replace the root of a lost tooth with biocompatible implants that integrate with the bone and preserve it.

results.title: The change speaks for itself
results.subtitle: Real cases from the clinic. Drag to compare.

reels.title: Smiles that speak

team.title: Expert hands behind every smile
team.subtitle: Tap a profile to meet them. A small team for genuinely personal care.

why.title: The difference is in the detail

items.title: Our own lab
items.description: We make your smile here, with no middlemen. Full control and shorter times.

items.title: See your smile first
items.description: Digital design: you preview the result before we start.

items.title: Boutique experience
items.description: Limited intake. Every case gets the time it deserves.

contact.subtitle: Tell us what you want to improve. We reply within 24 hours.
